name: aiscope self-terminating — read the example.com paragraph
description: Demonstrates the self-terminating aiscope mode: the step omits successCheck entirely, so the LLM decides when the goal is done by emitting 'done'.
goal: Navigate to example.com and let the LLM self-terminate after confirming the main paragraph is visible.

steps.name: AI: confirm the page has loaded (LLM decides)
steps.description: Self-terminating aiscope: no successCheck. The LLM observes the page, satisfies the goal by simply recognizing the main paragraph, and emits 'done'. The runner trusts that signal immediately and ends the loop. Budget caps (30s / 6 iterations) are the only safety net.

action.goal: Verify that example.com's main paragraph (starting with 'This domain is for use in illustrative examples') is visible on the page. Once you can see it, emit done.
